# Benchmark Results

> Results are generated by `python -m benchmarks.report` after running the stress, size, and correctness suites.
> See `benchmarks/results/` for raw JSON files.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED CONTENT BELOW — run `python -m benchmarks.report` to populate -->

Run the following from the project root to generate this file:

```bash
python -m benchmarks.stress --n 1000 --workers 20
python -m benchmarks.db_size
python -m benchmarks.correctness
python -m benchmarks.report --out mssql-saver/docs/BENCHMARKS.md
```
